nasb.text: David had a craving and said, “Oh that someone would give me water to drink from the well of Bethlehem, which is by the gate!”

esv.text: And David said longingly, “Oh that someone would give me water to drink from the well of Bethlehem that is by the gate!”

cnv.text: 大衛渴望說：“誰能把伯利恆城門旁邊池中的水，拿來給我喝！”

ccb.text: 大卫渴了，说：“真想有人打一些伯利恒城门旁的井水给我喝！”
